response: This code implements a **Bloom filter**, a space-efficient probabilistic data structure that uses multiple hash functions to test whether an element is a member of a set. When adding an item, it hashes the item with `num_hashes` different hash functions and sets the corresponding bits in a bit array to `True`; when checking membership, it verifies that all bits at the hashed positions are `True`, returning `True` if all bits are set (indicating the item might be present) or `False` if any bit is unset (definitively proving the item is not present).
